design_philosophy.theme: Romantic Luxury (Pastel & Soft with Gold Accents)
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix bridal elegance with modern SaaS clarity.
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel like a warm hug.
Content is King: The gifts are the heroes; the interface is the stage.
Generous Spacing: Use 2-3x more whitespace than standard apps.

usage.h1: font-heading text-5xl md:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight text-stone-800
usage.caption: font-body text-sm text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-widest

buttons.primary: bg-gold-500 hover:bg-gold-600 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-body font-bold transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-rose-50 hover:bg-rose-100 text-rose-900 border border-rose-200 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-body font-medium transition-all duration-300

cards.gift_card: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-rose-100/50 transition-all duration-500 border border-stone-100 group relative
cards.admin_card: bg-white rounded-xl border border-stone-200 p-6 shadow-sm

hero_background.alt: Elegant bridal shower table setting with pastel pink flowers and gold accents

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use generic 'Bootstrap' layouts. Use asymmetry and generous whitespace.
DO NOT use pure black (#000000). Use Stone-900 or Charcoal.
Ensure all text meets APCA contrast standards.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons (Heart, Gift, Check, User, Lock).
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes.

implementation_steps.description: Configure Tailwind with custom colors (Gold, Rose, Stone) and Fonts (Playfair, Lato). Update index.css with @import.
Create reusable UI components: Button (Pill), Card (Soft), Input (Clean), Modal (Dialog).
Build the 'Guest View' (Landing Page). Hero section with parallax effect, Gift Grid with filter tabs (Available/Taken).
Build the 'Gift Selection Modal'. Simple form with validation. Use Sonner for success feedback.
Build the 'Admin View'. Login page (simple password), Dashboard table with sort/filter, Add Gift form.
Ensure all states (Loading, Empty, Error) are designed with the same elegance as the success state.
